name: Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File
description: The product writes sensitive information (credentials, personal data, system details) to log files, creating an additional attack vector where unauthorized actors can access the less-protected log path to acquire sensitive data.
detection_pattern: STORAGE node containing sensitive data (credentials, PII, system info) flows through TRANSFORM node into EGRESS(log_file) without CONTROL node filtering or redacting sensitive fields before logging
